aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to a lack of structured, conversational content and missing authority signals. The website is not optimized for AI-driven search queries.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common HVAC questions and detailed answers.
Create content focused on conversational queries related to HVAC services.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is not optimized or even visible, causing a significant gap in local search visibility.
critical_issues: Google Business Profile is not found.
Missing photos, posts, and Q&A engagement on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no detected issues.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Expand NAP citations to additional local directories and platforms.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
Lack of Service schema for specific offerings

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: The website lacks structured data and conversational content tailored for AI search queries.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC repair in Houston' or 'AC maintenance tips'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema and creating a blog with AI-optimized HVAC content.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts by publishing detailed guides, case studies, and obtaining certifications.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for conversational search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI assistants.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their Google Business Profile is not found, and their website lacks structured data and FAQ content.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, conversational content, and GBP optimization to make their business stand out to AI models.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimized for AI are already capturing market share. The longer they wait, the more they risk losing visibility.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your HVAC Business in Houston
opening_line: We analyzed your website and found significant opportunities to improve your visibility with AI search and voice assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI-driven search and boost your lead generation.
